mapper.sql: id, config_name, config_code, semester_id, weight_mode, enable_weight, use_fixed_standard, min_weight, max_weight, enable_weight_limit, segment_rules, apply_to_all, apply_scope, effective_date, expire_date, is_default, standard_size_mode, standard_size, range_departments, range_grades, range_classes, status, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM class_weight_configs WHERE config_code = #{configCode} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM class_weight_configs WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND (effective_date IS NULL OR effective_date <= #{currentDate}) AND (expire_date IS NULL OR expire_date >= #{currentDate})
AND apply_scope = #{applyScope}
ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM class_weight_configs WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND (effective_date IS NULL OR effective_date <= #{currentDate}) AND (expire_date IS NULL OR expire_date >= #{currentDate}) AND ( apply_to_all = 1 OR (range_classes IS NOT NULL AND JSON_CONTAINS(range_classes, CAST(#{classId} AS JSON))) OR (range_grades IS NOT NULL AND JSON_CONTAINS(range_grades, CAST(#{gradeId} AS JSON))) OR (range_departments IS NOT NULL AND JSON_CONTAINS(range_departments, CAST(#{orgUnitId} AS JSON))) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN range_classes IS NOT NULL AND JSON_CONTAINS(range_classes, CAST(#{classId} AS JSON)) THEN 1 WHEN range_grades IS NOT NULL AND JSON_CONTAINS(range_grades, CAST(#{gradeId} AS JSON)) THEN 2 WHEN range_departments IS NOT NULL AND JSON_CONTAINS(range_departments, CAST(#{orgUnitId} AS JSON)) THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, is_default DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM class_weight_configs WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND is_default = 1 AND (effective_date IS NULL OR effective_date <= #{currentDate}) AND (expire_date IS NULL OR expire_date >= #{currentDate}) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
